title: AI second brain: hybrid GraphRAG retrieval
summary: A new brain layer connects your governed graph, full-text search, and the vector engine into one retriever — so the assistant pulls the right, connected slice of your data instead of being overwhelmed by all of it.
highlights: Hybrid retrieval fuses semantic + keyword search, then walks typed relations for multi-hop context
A strict token/hop budget keeps answers focused; extra matches stay one click away (just-in-time)
First-class, private-by-default memory that's auditable back to its source notes
